mnemonics.title: 5G Pillars
mnemonics.content: EMBB (Enhanced Mobile Broadband), mMTC (Massive Machine-Type Communications), URLLC (Ultra-Reliable Low Latency Communications)

mnemonics.title: MIMO Types
mnemonics.content: SISO (Single In Single Out), SIMO (Single In Multiple Out), MISO (Multiple In Single Out), MIMO (Multiple In Multiple Out)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine flashlight beams directing signals to specific users
Picture layered cake with different slices for IoT, video streaming, etc

analogies.analogy: Like adding more water fountains in a stadium to reduce crowd distance
High-speed sports car that needs smooth roads (clear LOS)
